items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Contact roles per account (decision maker, billing, operator)', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the business process but do not include any checks or reads related to contact roles or their association with accounts. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
